cues.label: The contract chain
cues.headline: Each stage hands the next an artifact
cues.narration: Each stage produces an artifact the next stage depends on, so break one contract and the downstream stages run on the wrong thing.

cues.label: Plan and Organize
cues.headline: A vague plan optimizes a vague goal
cues.narration: Planning picks the task, scale, data mix, and eval target, then Organize cleans, deduplicates, and mixes the corpus.

cues.label: Tokenize
cues.headline: Text becomes stable integer IDs
cues.narration: The tokenizer maps strings to integer IDs the embedding table learns, so training and serving must agree on those IDs.

cues.label: Train
cues.headline: The output is weights, not a product
cues.narration: Training adjusts weights to predict the next token and its output is a checkpoint of learned weights, not a finished product.

cues.label: Evaluate
cues.headline: The gate before anyone trusts it
cues.narration: Evaluation decides whether a checkpoint is good enough, safe enough, and better than the alternatives before it ships.

cues.label: The map
cues.headline: Seven stages, seven contracts
cues.narration: Treat the pipeline as an address system, where each contract locates a future topic on the same shared map.
